problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
